title: Tutorial screen to Onboarding screen
scenario: Tutorial screen navigation to Onboarding tab displays correct start page with image and text matching Figma design
steps: 1. Launch the Poly Studio Mobile app.
2. On the Tutorial screen, locate and tap the Onboarding tab.
3. Observe the displayed Onboarding start page.
4. Verify that the image and text on the page match the Figma design specifications.
expected: The Onboarding start page is displayed with the correct image and text, matching the Figma design.
